title: Smoky Flaky Kosher Cheese Crumble
description: An energizing Mediterranean dish featuring a smoky flavor profile and a flaky texture, perfect for breakfast or snack time. It's kosher-friendly and packed with cheese.

ingredients.name: Olive Oil
ingredients.notes: For frying and topping the crumble

ingredients.name: Paprika
ingredients.notes: For a touch of color and flavor

instructions: Prepare the chicken by placing each piece in a shallow dish.
Mix together mild harissa paste, garlic powder, and paprika in another bowl. Sprinkle this mixture over both pieces of chicken evenly.
Season with black pepper to taste. Cover the dish with foil if preferred.
Place the chicken in a baking dish, drizzle with olive oil, and bake for 25 minutes or until fully cooked.
Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly.
While waiting, prepare the cheese crumble by crumbling the grated Gouda into small pieces. Mix it with cooled chicken meat in a large bowl.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
